scenarios.title: Failed rollover retains the last coherent Market Brief pair

gherkin.given: a clean published snapshot payload and history all target July 15 and isolated Tier A advances its candidate to July 16
gherkin.when: Tier B fails or is skipped without a valid July 16 payload
gherkin.then: the July 15 snapshot payload and published history remain while independently refreshed raw data may commit and no validator or browser observes mixed target dates

linkedTests.testId: current payload satisfies the executable brief contract
linkedTests.requiredAssertion: The repository consumer rejects any current payload whose next-session date differs from the current snapshot target date.
The fail-closed Feature 004 collision contract passes independently before Playwright discovery or browser execution.

linkedTests.testId: TP-01-12 shared Playwright runtime and discovery foundation
linkedTests.requiredAssertion: The committed .spec.mjs matcher, exact 12-browser/2-Node inventory boundary, existing shared-seam contract, both valid direct-Node ownership forms, both Node-to-Playwright import exclusions, checkout-local runtime identity, and no-fallback authority are all enforced without weakening.
Unrestricted --list begins at Listing tests, reports 133 tests in 12 .spec.mjs files, and emits no .test.mjs Node prelude.

plannedRegressions.testTitle: Regression BUG-002: target-date rollover retains the last coherent pair when Tier B fails
Regression BUG-002: a failed rollover never serves prior-session actions beside an advanced Tier-A snapshot
plannedRegressions.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/market-brief-session-date-drift.spec.mjs --config=playwright.config.mjs --project=system-chrome --grep "Regression BUG-002: a failed rollover never serves prior-session actions beside an advanced Tier-A snapshot" --reporter=list

sharedInfrastructureAmendment.designDisposition: Existing production design plus the scoped shared-test-infrastructure amendment is sufficient; no production architecture, state machine, data flow, or user behavior changes.
acceptedRollbackUnit: the paired runtime-foundation matcher and inventory assertions
the one-line BUG-002 browser-suite shared-runtime import
sharedInfrastructureAmendment.preGateMutation: bubbles.test adopts only the exact direct-Node predicate hunk and preserves every excluded byte

requiredPreRegressionRepair.repairContract: Use Feature 009's existing injected-clock seam to make E2E evaluation deterministic without weakening production staleness behavior or the expected complete state.
requiredPreRegressionRepair.restartAfterFocusedVerification: BUG-002 immediate foundation check followed by unchanged Gates 1-7
